news.summary: Join the investor conference webinar hosted by Baltic Horizon Fund on May 15, 2025, at 13:00 CET or 14:00 EET. Unitholders, investors, analysts, and stakeholders are encouraged to participate in this event.
news.headline: Baltic Horizon Fund to present Q1 2025 results in webinar on May 15th at 13:00 CET or 14:00 EET. Join stakeholders.

news.summary: In Shenzhen, China on May 9, 2025, Big Tree Cloud Investment Holdings Group (NASDAQ: DSY) announced that on May 6, 2025, they finalized a strategic capital increase. This round of funding involved Shenzhen Wengu Development Investment Partnership (Limited) and marked a significant milestone for the group. The specific financial figures involved in this transaction were not disclosed.
news.headline: Big Tree Cloud Holdings Group completed strategic capital increase on May 6, 2025, with Shenzhen Wengu Development Investment Partnership.

news.summary: Dublin - A report on the global Artificial Intelligence (AI) in Drug Discovery Market has been recently added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. In 2024, the market was valued at USD 1.72 billion and is expected to reach USD 8.53 billion by 2030, displaying a considerable growth rate with a CAGR of 30.59%. The pharmaceutical sector has shown a notable uptick in the adoption of AI technology in recent years, contributing to the market's expansion.
news.headline: Global AI in drug discovery market valued at $1.72 billion in 2024, projected to reach $8.53 billion by 2030 with a 30.59% CAGR. Leading players include Atomwise, AWS, BenevolentAI, Google, IBM, Insilico Medicine, Microsoft, NVIDIA, Recursion Pharma.

news.summary: Atlanta-based company Corpay, Inc. (NYSE: CPAY), a prominent player in corporate payments globally, revealed that it is set to take part in upcoming investor conferences. Specifically, on Tuesday, May 20, 2025, the company will be present at the 15th Annual Barclays Emerging Payments and FinTech Forum in New York, NY. Senior management will engage in a fireside chat starting at 8:00 AM Eastern Time. Additionally, on Tuesday, June 3, 2025, the company will attend the Baird 2025 Global Consumer, Technology & Service conference.
news.headline: Corpay (NYSE: CPAY) to attend investor conferences on May 20 & June 3, 2025 in NY. Fireside chat at 8:00AM ET on May 20.

news.summary: TaskUs, a top provider of outsourced digital services and next-gen customer experience, based in New Braunfels, Texas, disclosed today its move to transition into a privately held company. This decision comes after reaching a definitive agreement, involving an affiliate of Blackstone, TaskUs Co-Founder and CEO Bryce Maddock, and TaskUs Co-Founder and President Jaspar Weir. TaskUs is listed as (Nasdaq: TASK) and caters to pioneering businesses worldwide. The shift to private status marks a significant change in the company's ownership structure, signaling a new phase for TaskUs.
news.headline: TaskUs, Inc. (Nasdaq: TASK) will go private in a deal led by co-founders and Blackstone amid digital service success.

news.summary: In Miami, Fibernow, a prominent provider of fiber-based broadband, cloud-based video, and digital voice services, has finalized the acquisition of Wavetechs, a boutique Managed Service Provider (MSP) recognized for its personalized service and strong ties with small business customers. The acquisition was completed in the first quarter of this year, encompassing Wavetechs' entire staff, exclusive product offerings, and client portfolio. Wavetechs will undergo a seamless integration into the Fibernow Business division, enhancing its service offerings.
news.headline: Fibernow acquires Wavetechs, adding robust IT services. Acquisition closed in Q1, including team and customer base.

news.summary: In Hollywood, Florida, at FICO World 25, a renowned analytics software provider, FICO, declared the recipients of the FICO Partner Awards during its annual conference. This prestigious recognition celebrates six firms that have demonstrated exceptional value to their corporate clients by leveraging the FICO Platform. The recipients were acknowledged for their dedication, creativity, and strategic foresight in driving success for their clients. For further details, visit the partner portal on FICO's website. Alexandre Graff expressed admiration for partners' ongoing dedication, innovative approaches, and forward-thinking perspectives.
news.headline: FICO Awards 6 Partners at FICO World 25 for delivering value with FICO Platform. Visit https://www.fico.com/en/partner-portal

news.summary: Crypto markets are witnessing a rally for the second consecutive day, buoyed by positive global trade prospects and optimistic market sentiment. Experts caution investors against FOMO, recommending strategic approaches. Key price gains in various cryptocurrencies include: Bitcoin ($103,120.94, +3.6%), Ethereum ($2,350.17, +20.4%), Solana ($173.61, +12.8%), XRP ($2.40, +9%), Dogecoin ($0.2087, +14%), and Shiba Inu ($0.00001525, +13.8%). Significant stats reveal Bitcoin saw a 3.8% increase in large transaction volume and 1.2% rise in daily active addresses, with transactions over $100,000 jumping from 10,628 to 14,818. Notably, 99% of BTC holders are profitable. Coinglass data notes 249,335 traders were liquidated within 24 hours for $1.14 billion, with short liquidations on May 8 hitting $394 million, indicating forced closures amid price surges. Santiment data indicates a rise in new Bitcoin wallet creations.
news.headline: Cryptocurrencies surge led by Ethereum at +20.4% gain, warnings against FOMO. BTC holder profits at 99%, $1.14B liquidated.

news.summary: In Singapore on May 9, 2025, Zoth, a rapidly expanding protocol specializing in real-world asset (RWA) tokenization, is embarking on a new chapter following a recent incident in March. An exploit temporarily disrupted activities on its ZeUSD platform. Rather than remaining inactive, the team promptly addressed the issue with openness and promptness, ...
news.headline: Zoth, a growing RWA tokenization protocol, progresses after disruption, focusing on security and scalability.

news.summary: A recent report highlights the critical need for maintaining continuity of support and attracting new service members to ensure military readiness and national security. The study, released in Lorton, Virginia on May 9, 2025, emphasizes the importance of these actions in safeguarding the country. The National Military Spouse Network (NMSN), a leading organization in this area, is actively involved in addressing this issue to guarantee the welfare of our armed forces. This underscores the significance of retaining experienced personnel and recruiting the next generation of service members. These efforts are crucial in enhancing overall military capabilities and protecting national interests effectively.
news.headline: NMSN releases white paper on military spouse transitions supporting veterans, emphasizing continuity and attracting new service members.

news.summary: On May 9, 2025 in Richmond, Virginia, WDM USA, a prominent company specializing in road safety and pavement management data, announced the addition of Andy Mergenmeier to their team as the new Director of Pavement & Safety Engineering. Mergenmeier, a highly regarded figure in the field, brings a wealth of expertise in pavement surface condition measurement. The appointment signifies WDM USA's commitment to further advancing in the field with Mergenmeier's leadership.
news.headline: WDM USA hires Andy Mergenmeier as Director of Pavement & Safety Engineering in Richmond, VA.

news.summary: Microchip Technology Inc. (MCHP), listed on NASDAQ, saw a premarket rise in shares following the release of their Q4 results. The report revealed a 26.8% decrease in revenue from last year, amounting to $970.5 million, exceeding the anticipated $962.8 million. For the first time in nearly three years, the company attained a book-to-bill ratio above one in the quarter. Bookings in April also surpassed any single month within the March quarter. The adjusted EPS stood at 11 cents, aligning with analyst expectations. Additionally, a quarterly cash dividend of 45.5 cents per share was announced. The news is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Microchip Technology Inc. stock rises with Q4 revenue at $970.5 million, down 26.8% Y/Y, beating analyst estimates. Book-to-bill ratio surpasses one for the first time in almost 3 years. Quarterly cash dividend of 45.5 cents per share declared.

news.summary: Chewy, Inc. disclosed in Plantation, Florida that they will release their fiscal first quarter 2025 financial figures prior to market commencement on Wednesday, June 11, 2025. The company, listed as CHWY on NYSE, which is known for being a reliable platform for pet parents and partners, will have its management conduct a conference call and webcast at 8:00 am ET to deliberate on the financial outcomes. For those wishing to join the call via phone, a registration link will be provided.
news.headline: Chewy to report fiscal Q1 2025 results on June 11, 2025. Conference call at 8:00 am ET. (NYSE: CHWY)

news.summary: Ewing, New Jersey - Universal Display Corporation has disclosed that it will participate and deliver presentations at SID Display Week 2025. This renowned event, focused on advancements in display technologies, attracts professionals and experts from the industry worldwide. The company’s involvement indicates a valuable opportunity to showcase their innovations and engage with an extensive audience.
news.headline: Universal Display Corp to participate in SID Display Week 2025, showcasing OLED tech.

(NYSE: INMD) called DOMA Perpetual Capital Management LLC has emphasized the need for the company's board to promptly increase and expedite buyback efforts. They also recommended for the removal of Moshe Mizrahy as the CEO of InMode. This information was disclosed on May 9, 2025, from Miami.

This AI-powered assistant aims to aid users in exploring decentralized finance (DeFi). The launch comes with the availability of 8 million $VELVET tokens as rewards for users.
news.headline: Velvet Capital releases Velvet Unicorn AI Copilot for DeFi with 8M $VELVET rewards. Launch campaign ahead of TGE.

news.summary: Dublin - A recent report titled "Pet Food Market - Focused Insights 2025-2030" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings, revealing that the Pet Food Market reached a value of USD 128.21 billion in 2024. It is anticipated to achieve USD 185.54 billion by 2030, with a projected Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.35%. This global pet food market analysis contains detailed information about 28 different vendors operating in the sector. The industry is fiercely competitive, with numerous key players propelling expansion by leveraging innovation, robust brand recognition, and a wide range of product offerings.
news.headline: "Global pet food market valued at USD 128.21B in 2024, projected to reach USD 185.54B by 2030, with a CAGR of 6.35%."

news.summary: In Dublin, a report titled "U.S. Personalized Gifting Market - Industry Outlook & Forecast 2025-2030" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The U.S. Personalized Gifting Market achieved a value of USD 9.69 Billion in 2024 and is anticipated to escalate to USD 14.56 Billion by 2030, marking a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.02%. This market in the U.S. is fiercely competitive, encompassing various participants, including renowned brands and specialized small businesses, all providing unique offerings.
news.headline: Report predicts U.S. Personalized Gifting market to reach $14.56B by 2030 from $9.69B in 2024, growing at 7.02% CAGR. Industry has a variety of players competing.

news.summary: Senate Banking Committee Chairman Tim Scott criticized the failure of the GENIUS Act in a Senate vote, blaming partisan politics for hindering progress towards greater affordability and innovation in stablecoins. Scott accused Democrats of prioritizing political gamesmanship and obstructing innovation in favor of opposing President Donald Trump. Democrats, including Senator Elizabeth Warren, raised concerns about potential corruption linked to Trump family-backed stablecoin, USD1, alleging a surge in market value due to a shady crypto deal with the UAE. Democrats sponsored bills to address concerns around Trump's crypto activities, with initiatives like the MEME Act and the End Crypto Corruption Act introduced to prevent federal officials from profiting from crypto assets. Scott and Republicans viewed the failure of the GENIUS Act as a missed bipartisan achievement, while Democrats emphasized the need to combat corruption and conflicts of interest in crypto ventures associated with Trump.
news.headline: Senator Tim Scott criticized partisan politics for sabotaging the GENIUS Act, which failed to reach cloture in the Senate for greater affordability and innovation. Scott blamed Democrats for shifting opposition towards the bill to deny President Trump a legislative victory. Senator Elizabeth Warren raised concerns about Trump-linked stablecoin, USD1, citing a surge in market value due to a questionable crypto deal. Democrats introduced bills to address concerns around Trump's crypto activities, with aims to prevent corruption and conflict of interest.

This achievement emphasizes the continued international expansion of the platform and the increasing trust from retail and institutional investors alike.
news.headline: Bybit reaches 70M users, emphasizes transparency, institutional growth. World's second-largest crypto exchange.
